reply_text: You missed my records under my maiden name Rodriguez. I got married in 2022 and changed to Chen.
agent_summary: Consumer reports a name change from Rodriguez to Chen following marriage in 2022. This explains the identity discrepancy found during matching — records exist under both last names. The consumer is requesting that records under the maiden name 'Rodriguez' also be included in the deletion request.
suggested_action: Re-run search with maiden name 'Sofia Rodriguez' as additional search criteria. Review existing matches MATCH-004 through MATCH-006 which already identified records under both names. Confirm all Rodriguez-associated records are included in the deletion scope.
draft_response:
Dear Sofia,

Thank you for providing this additional information. We have identified records under both your maiden name (Rodriguez) and your current name (Chen) in our systems. Our matching process has already flagged these records, and we are ensuring all associated records under both names are included in your deletion request.

We will update you once the review is complete.

Best regards,
Privacy Operations Team

reply_text: I also have a the customer app app account with a different email — jsmith_personal.com
agent_summary: Consumer provides an additional email address (jsmith_personal.com) associated with their the customer app app account. This email was not included in the original request which used jsmith.com. A Sales CRM record (REC-011) has already been identified with this personal email via phone number matching.
suggested_action: Verify that REC-011 (Sales CRM record with email jsmith_personal.com) is already included in the match set. Search for any additional records associated with the personal email that may not have been caught by the initial phone-based matching. Check the customer app app data source specifically.
draft_response:
Dear John,

Thank you for sharing this additional email address. We have already identified a purchase record associated with jsmith_personal.com through our matching process. We will conduct an additional search using this email to ensure we capture any records that may have been missed, including your the customer app app account data.

We appreciate your help in ensuring a thorough response to your request.

Best regards,
Privacy Operations Team
